next_runtime_branch_recommendation: blocked until hosted deployment is verified; use planning-only P87 connector runtime planning or hosted deployment remediation
notes: P86 is planning-only and adds no runtime observation writes.
Raw query retention, IP tracking, account tracking, user profiling, telemetry, public aggregates, and index/cache/ledger/candidate/master mutations remain disabled.
Hosted deployment, rate limits, retention/deletion/backup, privacy/poisoning guard runtime, and operator approval are required before any implementation.
